name: Open Graph
description: The Open Graph protocol enables web pages to become rich objects in social media feeds. By adding meta tags to HTML pages, websites can control how their content appears when shared on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and other social platforms with custom titles, descriptions, images, and URLs.
advantages: Controls how content appears when shared on social media
Improves click-through rates with rich preview cards
Widely supported across all major social platforms
Simple to implement with just meta tags
Supports structured data like videos, products, and articles
disadvantages: Only affects how links appear when shared
Different platforms may render OG tags slightly differently
Requires server-side rendering or static meta tags for full support
